penalties.description: The knot appears to slip slightly when tension is applied, but remains intact.
A visible hand switch between throws seems to have been missed.

reasoning: The suture was placed through both marked targets and three throws were tied, but the knot exhibited some slippage. One hand switch was visibly missed. The video quality allowed for phase detection but not detailed verification of throw sequences.
